author: alythobani
description: Quickly add, change, or remove callouts in your notes.

manifest.author: Aly Thobani
manifest.description: Quickly add, change, or remove callouts in your notes.
manifest.name: Callout Toggles

name: Callout Toggles

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: Fixes plugin crash on load when settings file doesn't exist yet

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Feat: Auto-selection / auto-cursor settings

- Can now further customize auto-selection / auto-cursor (what to select, or where to place the cursor) after inserting, wrapping, or removing a callout
- Options include: select up to header, select full callout, select callout title, place cursor at end, etc.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
New settings added:

1. Explicit or implicit callout titles
2. Callout ID capitalization: lowercase, uppercase, sentence case, or title case
3. Foldable callouts (unfoldable, foldable / expanded by default, foldable / collapsed by default)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
Fixes handling of multi-word / hyphenated callout IDs
- "Remove callout from selected lines" now works on multi-word callout IDs (previously not detected)
- Default callout title now has hyphens replaced by spaces, to match how Obsidian displays callouts without custom titles

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
First release 🌱

## Features

* `Wrap lines in [X] callout` command for each callout
* `Remove callout from selected lines` command
* Optional syncing with Callout Manager plugin

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/alythobani/obsidian-callout-toggles/commits/1.0.0
